title: Regional Anatomy（局部解剖学）
description: Welcome to our comprehensive Regional Anatomy open online course, crafted for medical students, graduates, anatomists, and practicing clinicians. As a fundamental pillar of medical education, this course is taught entirely in English with bilingual subtitles, supporting clear understanding for a wide range of professional learners. It offers in-depth insights into anatomical structures and their spatial connections, and is purpose-built to connect theoretical anatomy with real-world clinical application, building a strong foundation for your clinical career. Don’t miss the chance to enhance your anatomical knowledge and clinical skills. Join our Regional Anatomy course, and use your improved practice to contribute to the development of medical science.
